overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The camera follows a character crossing a neon-lit intersection and proceeding along sidewalks lined with holographic advertisements, glowing storefronts, and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with marked crosswalks

events.description: black sedan drives through the intersection from left to right with headlights reflecting on wet pavement
steps onto the red-paved sidewalk leaving the open intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet intersection, navigating between moving vehicles while heading toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection with bright headlights cutting through the rain

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing painted on the rain-slicked asphalt
large red neon sign with stylized lettering mounted on a building facade
rain-soaked black asphalt reflecting the red and cyan neon lights from surrounding buildings
tall cyberpunk structure with teal and red neon accents and glass facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide futuristic intersection at night during heavy rain. The camera follows the character across yellow-striped crosswalks while a black sedan passes through the intersection. Neon signs illuminate the wet asphalt as the character approaches the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: begins following a pedestrian carrying a glowing purple umbrella along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the red-paved sidewalk following a character with a distinctive glowing purple umbrella

notable_agents.action: character with a glowing purple umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing a red top

entered.detail: distinctive red tiled pedestrian walkway reflecting the vibrant neon lights from storefronts
transparent glass barrier with metal posts separating the sidewalk from a lower street level
cluster of bright neon signs and holographic displays advertising various businesses
large floating digital advertisement displaying animated content above the street

segments.scene_description: The character moves onto a red-paved sidewalk lined with glass railings and neon storefronts. The camera follows a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella as they walk past holographic billboards and futuristic shop facades reflecting in the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial street with vendor stalls and layered signage

events.description: passing a street vendor stand with scattered newspapers and items displayed on the wet pavement
futuristic green armored truck drives past on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and a street vendor with a cluttered display

notable_agents.action: street vendor tending to a newspaper stand with scattered magazines and items on the ground

entered.detail: cluttered street stand with magazines, newspapers, and various items displayed on crates and the wet ground
illuminated digital sign displaying speed limit 40 mounted on a pole
large futuristic military-style truck with green armor plating driving on the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues down a narrower commercial street with increased pedestrian density. The camera passes a street vendor with a cluttered newspaper stand on the left while futuristic vehicles pass on the adjacent road. Dense layers of neon signage and holographic advertisements illuminate the rain-soaked corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked intersection into the dense, neon-saturated corridors of a futuristic commercial district. It begins by following a character across yellow-striped crosswalks as a black sedan glides through the heavy rain and neon light reflecting off the wet asphalt. As the character reaches the sidewalk, the scene shifts onto red pavement lined with glass railings, passing a pedestrian with a glowing purple umbrella amidst shimmering holographic billboards. The camera then pushes forward into a narrower street where the environment becomes more crowded, moving past a cluttered newspaper stand and streaming traffic. Finally, the view settles into a rain-soaked corridor dominated by dense layers of glowing signage and towering holographic advertisements.
